channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Household rubbish dumped on pavement, 8th July
item.description:
Yet again this house, 2 Abbey Grove, has just dumped their rubbish on the pavement making access for pushchairs and wheelchairs difficult.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgusting amount of rubbish, 8th July
item.description:
3rd time of reporting. Nothing has been cleared. This road is a disgrace, rubbish all over the pavement and in the gutters. Getting blown into the church grounds. Broken glass, rubbish bags, cans, bottles, dirty nappies, food wrappings. PLEASE CLEAN IT UP.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Permit Holders Timeplate sprayed on Lorrimore road, 8th July
item.description:
Permit Holders Timeplate sprayed on Lorrimore road O/S 92
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 123-181, Lorrimore Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest bike parked on private driveway, 8th July
item.description:
Forest bike parked on a private driveway. Total disrespect.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kendal Close, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken paving slabs, 8th July
item.description:
Reported before, as I tripped up, and report came back as fixed, however nothing has been done about this paving and could cause someone a serious injury. Caused by delivery vehicles for the shop parking on the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Wood Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urine smell by bins, 8th July
item.description:
The area by the recycling and clothes bin stinks of urine. It hasn’t rained in days and isn’t due to rain for ages. I saw a man piss there and now I can smelt it from my back garden. Please can you send someone to hose down the area. Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hassett Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Permit holders Time plate sprayed Outside, 8th July
item.description:
Permit holders Time plate sprayed Outside 32 Westcott Rd
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westcott Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 30 Minutes free bay time plate sprayed, 8th July
item.description:
30 Minutes free bay time plate sprayed Opp 2 Rotherhithe New road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe New Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many fly in the food recycle bin, and they fly into the property, 8th July
item.description:
There is a public health issue and hygien issue for the area. Would you please also advise how often will the bin be empty and cleaned ?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68-144, Cherry Garden Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 8th July
item.description:
Lots of rubbish all over the pavement near the telephone exchange box opposite De Lucy Street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chancelot Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on walkway/footpath, 8th July
item.description:
The sloped walkway leading from Morrisons car park to the High Street (via Nelson Rd) is littered with rubbish. This rubbish on this walkway has been there for well over a week and looks unsightly. Please can this be cleaned up. Perhaps some signage to remind people to take their rubbish home might help. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Back Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nw1 8ja, 8th July
item.description:
This job was reported about tree removal which was decided would remove health and light problems Ray came round nothing happened now he came back when I look on message sent to me says job completed IT HAS NOT BEEN DONE IM REALLY UPSET ABOUT THIS PLEASE GET BACK TO ME NW1 8JA 224b Gloucester Avenue ASAP
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163, Gloucester Avenue, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th July
item.description:
Large amount of rubbish dumped on the wall near to the electricity sub stationat the bottom on the green on Greening Street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greening Street, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loading Bay time plate missing, 8th July
item.description:
Loading Bay time plate missing on Brandenham Close Outside # 9
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bradenham Close, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle crashed into bollard, 8th July
item.description:
Bollard has come out of the ground due to vehicle collision and needs to be reset. The location is on the junction of South Sea Street and Rope street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Sea Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disappearing grass verges, 8th July
item.description:
Please can Bexley Council review the disappearing grass verges and poor paving between the pedestrian crossing by Chislehurst & Sidcup school and Greenwood Close. The grass verges are now non-existent on this side of Hurst Road and the paving is in a damaged condition.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is sick, 8th July
item.description:
The tree is about 5 years old . It does not have a water bag. There is a wound in the base of the bark which is encouraging fungi. Please feed the tree, water it and mulch it .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitehall Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 8th July
item.description:
Enfield council this subway has fly tipping here every day. Please do something about it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Fairway, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement completely blocked, 8th July
item.description:
There is no point reporting this to Lime bikes because their reporting app has a default setting of recording badly parked bikes as damaged bikes. This distorts the data that is sent to the council and affects the decision making process and the contracts . Anyway, for those wheel/pushchair users and blind people in our community, lets report it on here for you. Indeed for anyone wanting to walk up the pavement without stepping out into the road. Maybe, one day, people will care about each other...

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Gordon Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign totally faded, 8th July
item.description:
The parking restriction sign on the corner of Crofton Lane and Place Farm Avenue is completely faded/illegible and needs replacing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Place Farm Avenue, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
